'''鈭歾-p-v''' ('''kazapav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zorb|zorb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zorb|zorb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazapav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizapav|thizapav]] || [[word:jizapav|jizapav]] || [[word:shizapav|shizapav]] || [[word:kizapav|kizapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzapav|thuthuzapav]] || [[word:jujuzapav|jujuzapav]] || [[word:shushuzapav|shushuzapav]] || [[word:kukuzapav|kukuzapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzapav|thuzapav]] || [[word:juzapav|juzapav]] || [[word:shuzapav|shuzapav]] || [[word:kuzapav|kuzapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzapav|thuzapav]] || [[word:juzapav|juzapav]] || [[word:shuzapav|shuzapav]] || [[word:kuzapav|kuzapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezapav|thezapav]] || [[word:jezapav|jezapav]] || [[word:shezapav|shezapav]] || [[word:kezapav|kezapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozapav|thothozapav]] || [[word:jojozapav|jojozapav]] || [[word:shoshozapav|shoshozapav]] || [[word:kokozapav|kokozapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozapav|thozapav]] || [[word:jozapav|jozapav]] || [[word:shozapav|shozapav]] || [[word:kozapav|kozapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozapav|thozapav]] || [[word:jozapav|jozapav]] || [[word:shozapav|shozapav]] || [[word:kozapav|kozapav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]] || [[word:zapav|zapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zapav|th忙zapav]] || [[word:j忙zapav|j忙zapav]] || [[word:sh忙zapav|sh忙zapav]] || [[word:k忙zapav|k忙zapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazapav|thathazapav]] || [[word:jajazapav|jajazapav]] || [[word:shashazapav|shashazapav]] || [[word:kakazapav|kakazapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazapav|thazapav]] || [[word:jazapav|jazapav]] || [[word:shazapav|shazapav]] || [[word:kazapav|kazapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazapav|thazapav]] || [[word:jazapav|jazapav]] || [[word:shazapav|shazapav]] || [[word:kazapav|kazapav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazapav|shazapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazapav|goshazapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazapav|gokishazapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazapavn眉|shazapavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazapavnkn眉|goshazapavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapavn眉|gokishazapavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazapavsh毛|shazapavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazapavnksh毛|goshazapavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazapavsh毛|gokishazapavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapavro|shazapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapavnkro|goshazapavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapavro|gokishazapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapavmu|shazapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapavnkmu|goshazapavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapavmu|gokishazapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazapavsher|shazapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazapavnksher|goshazapavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazapavsher|gokishazapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazapavng|shazapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazapavnkng|goshazapavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazapavng|gokishazapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazapavya|shazapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazapavnkya|goshazapavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazapavya|gokishazapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazapavyam|shazapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazapavnkyam|goshazapavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazapavyam|gokishazapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapavn眉sh毛|shazapavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapavnkn眉sh毛|goshazapavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapavn眉sh毛|gokishazapavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapavn眉ro|shazapavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapavnkn眉ro|goshazapavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapavn眉ro|gokishazapavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapavn眉mu|shazapavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapavnkn眉mu|goshazapavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapavn眉mu|gokishazapavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapavsh毛n眉|shazapavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapavnksh毛n眉|goshazapavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapavsh毛n眉|gokishazapavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapavsh毛ro|shazapavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapavnksh毛ro|goshazapavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapavsh毛ro|gokishazapavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapavsh毛mu|shazapavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapavnksh毛mu|goshazapavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapavsh毛mu|gokishazapavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapavron眉|shazapavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapavnkron眉|goshazapavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapavron眉|gokishazapavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapavrosh毛|shazapavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapavnkrosh毛|goshazapavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapavrosh毛|gokishazapavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapavromu|shazapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapavnkromu|goshazapavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapavromu|gokishazapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapavmun眉|shazapavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapavnkmun眉|goshazapavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapavmun眉|gokishazapavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapavmush毛|shazapavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapavnkmush毛|goshazapavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapavmush毛|gokishazapavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapavmuro|shazapavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapavnkmuro|goshazapavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapavmuro|gokishazapavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
